name: CumulusSynthRelationshipGraph
label: Cumulus Synth Relationship Graph
description: Synthesized directed account-relationship graph (1:N edges per anchor) for Cumulus. Federated from FINS.PUBLIC.SYNTH_RELATIONSHIP_GRAPH via Snowflake Direct_Access. SRC_ACCOUNT_ID + DST_ACCOUNT_ID FK to ssot__Account__dlm. Composite 3-col PK collapses to edgeType single-column DC PK with KQ on src + dst.

fields.name: ssot__SrcAccountId
fields.label: Source Account ID
fields.description: Source anchor (the From side). FK to ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c.

fields.name: ssot__DstAccountId
fields.label: Destination Account ID
fields.description: Destination anchor (the To side). For SELF edges, equals src.

fields.name: edgeType
fields.label: Edge Type
fields.description: HOUSEHOLD / CORPORATE_PARENT / BOARD_MEMBER / ADVISOR_BOOK / REFERRAL / BUSINESS_OWNER / SELF.

fields.name: edgeWeight
fields.label: Edge Weight
fields.description: Edge strength in [0.000, 1.000]. SELF edges weight=1.000.

fields.name: confidencePct
fields.label: Confidence %
fields.description: Synthesis confidence in [30.00, 100.00]. SELF edges confidence=100.00.

fields.name: edgeDiscoveredDate
fields.label: Edge Discovered Date
fields.description: When this edge was first synthesized.

fields.name: metadata
fields.label: Metadata
fields.description: JSON-ish key-value notes; NULL when no synthesis context.

fields.name: generatedAt
fields.label: Generated At
fields.description: Run timestamp (UTC). Week-bucketed for byte-identical mid-week re-runs.
